skill: Inference from sample statistics and margin of error
stem: A sample of 800 adult smartphone users was selected at random. Based on the sample, it is estimated that 25% of all adult smartphone users use their phones to read e-books, with an associated margin of error of 2.85%. Which of the following is the most plausible conclusion about all adult smartphone users?

answerOptions.content: Between 22.15% and 27.85% of all adult smartphone users use their phones to read e-books.
More than 27.85% of all adult smartphone users use their phones to read e-books.
Since the sample did not include all e-book readers, no conclusion can be made.
Since the sample included users who do not read e-books, no conclusion can be made.

rationale:
Choice A is correct. The plausible range is 25% ± 2.85%, i.e., 22.15% to 27.85%.

Choice B falls outside the plausible interval. Choices C and D incorrectly claim that no conclusion can be drawn from a random sample.
